name: Rainbow Drive-In
tagline: The plate lunch cathedral since 1961 — mixed plate with gravy is the move.
mustOrder: mixed plate with gravy ($12–14) — teriyaki beef + mahimahi + fried chicken, 2 scoops rice, mac salad
parking: Small lot in front, fills up fast at lunch — street parking on Kanaina Ave
talkStory: Founded by Seiju Ifuku, a WWII 442nd Regiment veteran (the most decorated unit in US military history — all Japanese-Americans from Hawaii). 'Plate lunch' evolved from plantation-era bento boxes — Rainbow helped codify the modern format. Order at the window, grab your number. Take your plate to Kapiolani Park (one block) and eat under a tree with Diamond Head view — the local move.
